{"acceptance_criteria":["The planner output is valid JSON matching the requested planner-lite-v2 structure.","The output contains exactly one implementation task with validation_commands set to ["npm test"].","The implementation task lists likely_files as ["src/project-slug.js", "test/project-slug.test.js"].","The PRD and task criteria cover lowercase ASCII letters, space-to-hyphen conversion, surrounding whitespace trimming, and rejection of empty slugs after normalization."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Normalize Project Route Slugs

## Goal
Implement route slug normalization for projects so user-provided slug values are converted into a stable, URL-safe format before use.

## Requirements
- Trim surrounding whitespace from the input slug.
- Convert spaces inside the slug to hyphens.
- Convert ASCII letters to lowercase.
- Reject slugs that are empty after normalization.

## Non-Goals
- Do not introduce broader transliteration or Unicode normalization unless already required by existing code.
- Do not change unrelated routing behavior.","risks":["Existing callers may expect raw slug values and need updated tests if behavior changes.","The exact error shape for rejected empty slugs should match existing project conventions.","Only spaces are explicitly required to become hyphens; tabs or other whitespace may need a deliberate decision if encountered."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Slug normalization trims surrounding whitespace before any empty check.","ASCII letters in normalized slugs are lowercase.","Spaces in normalized slugs are converted to hyphens.","Inputs that become empty after trim and normalization are rejected using the project’s existing error style.","Unit tests cover uppercase input, internal spaces, surrounding whitespace, and empty/whitespace-only rejection."],"description":"Implement and test project route slug normalization according to the requested rules.","id":"task-normalize-project-route-slugs","likely_files":["src/project-slug.js","test/project-slug.test.js"],"title":"Normalize Project Route Slugs","validation_commands":["npm test"]}]}

{"acceptance_criteria":["The planner output is valid JSON matching the requested planner-lite-v2 structure.","The output contains exactly one implementation task with validation_commands set to ["npm test"].","The implementation task lists likely_files as ["src/project-slug.js", "test/project-slug.test.js"].","Slug normalization trims surrounding whitespace, converts spaces to hyphens, lowercases ASCII letters, and rejects empty slugs after normalization."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Normalize Project Route Slugs

## Goal
Implement route slug normalization for projects so user-provided slug values are converted into a stable route slug before use.

## Requirements
- Trim surrounding whitespace from the input slug.
- Convert spaces inside the slug to hyphens.
- Convert ASCII letters to lowercase.
- Reject slugs that are empty after normalization.

## Non-Goals
- Do not add broader transliteration or Unicode normalization unless the existing code already requires it.
- Do not change unrelated routing behavior.","risks":["Existing callers may expect raw slug values and need updated tests if behavior changes.","The exact error shape for rejected empty slugs should match existing project conventions.","Only spaces are explicitly required to become hyphens; tabs or other whitespace need a deliberate decision if encountered."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Slug normalization trims surrounding whitespace before checking for empty output.","ASCII letters in normalized slugs are lowercase.","Spaces in normalized slugs are converted to hyphens.","Inputs that become empty after normalization are rejected using the project's existing error style.","Unit tests cover uppercase input, internal spaces, surrounding whitespace, and empty or whitespace-only rejection."],"description":"Implement and test project route slug normalization according to the requested rules.","id":"task-normalize-project-route-slugs","likely_files":["src/project-slug.js","test/project-slug.test.js"],"title":"Normalize Project Route Slugs","validation_commands":["npm test"]}]}
